name: agent-saas-playbook
description: Greg Isenberg's 'AI Agents are the new SaaS' playbook as an installable agent skill.

plugins.name: agent-saas
plugins.description: Validate and spec an AI-agent business idea: score workflows on 5 traits, write the 7-part agent spec, pick the minimal useful agent shape, anchor pricing against labor cost, get a 30-day plan.
